claim_boundary: This is a fixed 10-case DEV calibration, not a holdout or promotion experiment.
The comparison begins after a fixed revision event annotation; it does not evaluate revision detection or an end-to-end observer.
Direct is a one-shot Responses call with the same fixed revision envelope, not an unqualified plain-API baseline.
Matching max_output_tokens ceilings does not match realized tokens, calls, latency, price, server compute, or reasoning effort consumed.
A Full advantage would support this staged public-card protocol on this DEV set; it would not isolate card structure from repeated calls or establish general LLM reasoning improvement.
Selective replay is not executed in this two-arm calibration and cannot receive a formal same-block rank from it.
The arm interfaces use different fixed instructions, and Full receives the same envelope metadata on each staged call while Direct receives it once.
Inherited v0.4 SDK call exceptions are counted but are not used to claim exact failed-call usage or a true transport-error classification.
No private chain-of-thought, hidden-state edit, persisted response state, or provider seed is used.

initial_evidence.text: The task is to assign a bay to shipment NERA using its current route code.

case.question: Which bay is assigned to shipment NERA? Answer AMBER or BLUE.
